subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to God, I hastened from the West unto the East, though in the Occident I rendered but a service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد لله از باختر سوی خاور شتافتم هر چند در غرب توفیق خدمتی
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @non-participation in politics, @spiritual transformation, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
